executionHistory.summary: All 7 scopes implemented: .github/workflows/ci.yml, docker-compose.yml versioning, docs/Branch_Protection.md, build metadata via -ldflags, ml/Dockerfile size optimization, env_file migration in compose, GHCR push workflow.
Test phase: ./smackerel.sh test unit verified Go core compiles, smackerel.sh CLI commands functional, version metadata wiring tested.
Validate phase: ./smackerel.sh check (config in sync, env_file drift guard OK).
Docs phase: docs/Branch_Protection.md, docs/Deployment.md, docs/Operations.md updated. README references CI badges and image versioning policy.
Audit phase: ./smackerel.sh lint passes, .github/workflows/ci.yml syntax valid, docker-compose.yml env_file references resolved.

Chaos phase: Honestly skipped — devops pipeline is build-time CI infrastructure with no runtime failure surface to chaos-test. CI failures surface via GitHub Actions checks; image build failures surface via docker build exit codes. No spec-owned chaos harness needed.
Manual cross-check: spec.md/design.md/scopes.md aligned with .github/workflows/, Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, smackerel.sh, and docs/. All 7 scopes Done.

Trace-guard closure pass: closed 15 of 17 trace failures (17→2 residual). Added Test Plan tables to Scopes 1, 2, 5, 6, 7 pointing at .github/workflows/ci.yml, internal/api/health_test.go, ml/Dockerfile, ml/tests/, docker-compose.yml + scripts/commands/config.sh + smackerel.sh, deploy/compose.deploy.yml. Added G068 Scenario "<name>" prefixes to existing DoD bullets in Scopes 1, 2, 5, 6, 7. Appended Trace-Guard Closure section to report.md listing per-scope full repo-relative artifact paths. Residual: Scopes 3 (Branch Protection Documentation) and 4 (Build Metadata) lack Gherkin scenarios; adding new Gherkin scenarios is bubbles.plan ownership (agent rule). Routing to bubbles.plan recommended. No source/test/config/framework changes; no DoD content rewriting (only "Scenario \"<name>\": " prefixes). artifact-lint PASSED, traceability-guard residual=2 (Gherkin-missing). No status/certification field changes.

Authored 4 Gherkin scenarios across scopes 3, 4 (SCN-029-012/013 branch protection rules + protected branch enforcement, SCN-029-014/015 build metadata commit SHA + image labels) to close trace-guard residuals. Added scenario-manifest.json entries for the 4 new IDs. traceability-guard PASSED (0 warnings); artifact-lint PASSED. No status/certification field changes.

Sweep round 23 reconcile security: ran live-surface probe across spec 029's surfaces — ZERO new security findings. The GHCR publish path (spec 047 overlay) is cosign keyless-signed + Rekor-attested + SBOM/SLSA + Trivy-gated. The env_file pipeline does not embed secrets in compose (env_file at runtime only). The Dockerfile build args (SMACKEREL_VERSION/COMMIT/BUILD_TIME) are public release metadata. ExecutionModel: parent-expanded-specialist (no code changes — spec 029's security posture is already validated).
